sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْمُبَكِّرُ يُعْطِي الْجِسْمَ الرَّاحَةَ الَّتِي يَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Rano spavanje daje tijelu odmor koji mu je potreban.
sentences.translationEn: Sleeping early gives the body the rest it needs.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Liječnici savjetuju spavanje u trajanju od osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: السَّهَرُ الطَّوِيلُ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالتَّعَبِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Kasno ostajanje budnim dovodi do osjećaja umora ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Staying up late leads to feeling tired in the morning.
